entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Sorry for the confusion. The workaround described at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-overcome-an-http-error-421-occured-ssl-handshake-error-with-the/qaq-p/13635971#M4821624 does not work here as expected, because it updates only the system's user trust list but not for technical SAP users.

Meanwhile the SAP Global Trust List has been updated with the new root CA "UserTrust ECC Authority" that GitHub.com is using. But it will take still some time until the change has been propagated through all running systems with the next 2405 upgrade mid of May.

Sorry for the inconvenience,

Christoph

entry.title: SAP Build Code Jam Error on Part 8
entry.content:
Hello there,

I am encountering an issue with Part 8 of the SAP Build Code Jam and cannot wrap my head around the error I encounter. I was able to complete Part 7 and test the Process I created, it worked well. I then went on creating the action for fetching the business partner by number (created the Destination for it before, using the Destination Definition from the sap-build GitHub). I tested the action and it worked well : 

I then went on to amend the Process with the newly created action

Added the action, amended the condition of BPGroup, updated the inputs of the Approval Form with values coming from the action. I proceeded then to update the Build App itself, adding a page variable to the Cart view, associated it with the Dropdown BP, updated the Purchase button logic (the part of the Create Record) with the BP Page Variable. 

I then test the application and check the Process in the Monitoring section, where I run into this error : 

Have any of you encountered similar issues? I also tried modifying the Destinations of the S4 HANA by adding "TrustAll" - True property, instead of having the "Use default JDK truststore" checkbox checked (I encountered issue with this also on the "April (Citizen) Developer Challenge".

entry.title: Customize body mail for medium type 5 external send
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I am trying to customize the body mail that is sent automatically by the output MAIL linked to the invoice that has the medium type 5 external send

A mail is correcly generated with the Invoice form in PDF but there is no body mail.

I would like to change the mail subject and body.

I found some oss note 1505357 informing that there is no possibility to add text on the body mail and an old post https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/sd-invoice-email-to-customer-as-attached-pdf-with-text-body/m-p/8761794#M1676557 but there is no clear explanation how to do it

can you please advise ?

thank you

entry.title: How to make a REST "PUT" call to a dynamic url and pass Binary file content in body in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am working on MDK app in which I need to make a REST "PUT" call to a dynamic url generated in previous rest api calls and pass the Binary file content in body. I am not really sure how to approach this as I have a file path where the template word file is stored.

The dynamic url is a pre-signed url from Adobe Document Services where this file from my machine needs to be uploaded.

 

Best Regards,

Geet

Best Regards

SAP learner.

entry.title: [EWM] What is the meaning of refdoccat value "ERP" (/scdl/db_refdoc)
entry.content:
EWM is so hard to me 😞 please help!

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Extending Electronic Outgoing Invoices for Government Tracking using In-App Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi Marko,

Thank you for the kind feedback about this blog. Basically there is an running code example available when implementing this extension point via the Custom Logic App which may give some further hints. In case of general unexpected system behavior there is of course the possibility to allow interaction via normal customer incident handling.

Just some remarks which may help: in general this is used in the eDocument component for Italy. The system calls this extension point when it generates the XML file using the Italy eInvoice process in the eDocument Cockpit. Basically you can validate via the Custom Logic Tracing App in case the corresponding import parameter is containing useful information about the source document. E.g. an accounting document or a document related to the billing document. The XML_FILE* parameter  structures should contain the full XML file as it was built by the standard mapping and validate the XML_FILE_MODIFIED* parameter for the full XML file after being enhanced by your new custom implementation. This structure reflects the final version of the XML file for the corresponding eDocument.

Kind regards

Stefan

entry.title: How create a plugin session timeout with a countdown timer in SAPUI5 Launchpad with backend server?
entry.content:
Hallo everyone,

I need to create a plugin session for timeout in the Launchpad, when the user is inactive for two minutes, he will reseive a notification ( see the photo please) with countdown timer for example 5 minutes, telling him that he will be forced to logout if in 5 minutes if inactivity continues.

The Plugin should appear next to the Search plugin.

Have someone an idea, step by step please?

 

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Quarterly vat declaration Italy
entry.content:
Dear All,

our customer has three companies. One company with monthly VAT declaration and two companies with quarterly VAT declaration. For the first company there are no problems, for the other two companies there is a problem because for these the model that should come out from "Run Statutory Reports" APP should report the total for a single quarter and not the individual three months:

Is there another application to use for these situations?

Thanks and Kind Regards,

Gloria

entry.title: Start page of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition, the 4 pillars and documentation
entry.content:
From data to in-depth Insights and value: Get the most out of your SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition analysis

Dear Community,

Welcome to the initial blog of the blog journey, leading you through SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition!

In today's competitive business environment, efficiency and cost reduction are essential for business success. SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition offers a crucial solution, providing clarity, transparency, and the opportunity for process optimization, regardless of company size.

Interested in analyzing your processes but haven't begun?

In this part I set out the vital benefits and the value you will experience by viewing your business processes based on your source system with SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition!

SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is the ideal starting point when you want to:

  • Transit from your SAP ERP system to SAP S/4HANA
  • Analysize your processes
  • Optimize your SAP S/4HANA system

Explore your process flow as well as process indicators, recommended actions and innovation suggestions based on the latest technology, helping you to improve and gaining most value of your business.

Additional features encompass identifying process flaws, with tailored correction and innovation recommendations available to enhance operational efficiency. The correction- and innovation recommendations are tailored to your business needs for both lines of business and end-to-end processes enabling targeted improvements. In addition, you will identify new functionalities from SAP S/4HANA, SAP Fiori apps, automation, and intelligent technologies to support your business goals.

SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition offers a starting point to examine your initial process flow where you will be able to discover the value before committing to the full version. The SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition contains the same user interface experiences and comes with the same capabilities as the full edition. While its scope is broad yet bounded, the analysis is beneficial because the insights you gain into your business processes are invaluable.

It also comes with no cost* and takes five business days until you receive your analysis after you requested it.

*For SAP maintenance customers.

Read this blogpost to understand: The difference between SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition and the full edition

The four main pillars

At its core, SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition offers functionalities, helping users to identify areas for improvement. First, the solution provides a detailed Process Flow, a visual representation of a process journey from start to finish with related information, blockers, and time stamps. Furthermore, Performance Indicators offer insights into process performance metrics, empowering users to make data-driven decisions and start your process improvement initiatives. Based on this performance assessment, the analysis provides Correction- and Innovation Recommendations to help you fix and improve your processes.

Together, these four pillars form a robust framework for organizations to optimize their processes, drive efficiency, and achieve sustainable growth. When accessing the respective areas, you will also see that everything is build up around these four pillars. You can access everything from the start menu or view the information from the respective areas such as End-to-end processes or from Lines of Business.  

How-to Guide

Every phase of your SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery journey is supported by dedicated resources. The image below illustrates the four straightforward steps to request your one-time free* analysis.

*For SAP maintenance customers

Access How-to Guide

 

Getting Started Guide

In case you have just received your SAP Signavio Process insights, discovery edition analysis and want to get started - the get-started guide is your backup document. It covers important topics such as how to access the analysis and how to add users. It then provides a comprehensive overview on reviewing your analysis and outlines next steps on how to continue your journey with SAP Signavio.

Access the Getting Started Guide

User Guide – Process analysis guide

Your SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition analysis provides your with the technical knowledge around process performance, enabling you to understand every key concept in details. As you can see the start menu displays the four pillars with the respective results based on your source system.

It is particularly important as it helps you with further explanations. By clicking on the “documentation” button on the bottom left, you will be redirected to the User Guide (picture below) of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition.

This guide offers valuable insights and detailed explanations and serves as a roadmap to navigate through complex data.

For busy readers – Key take aways

  • SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is a vital tool for businesses seeking efficiency and cost reduction in today's competitive environment. 
  • Benefits and value: Start the transition to SAP S/4HANA and optimize processes, with process flow analysis, tailored recommendations, and access to new functionalities.
  • The discovery edition allows users to explore its value with no costs* involved before committing to the full version.
  • How-to Guide: Outlines the 4 steps to request your SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition analysis.
  • Get-Started Guide helps users who have just received their analysis to access it, add users, review the analysis, and plan next steps.
  • Access the User guide as a resource for navigating and understanding the analysis effectively.
  • SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is available in 8 languages: English, German, French, Portuguese, Japanese, Spanish, Korean, and simplified Chinese. Read the blog for further details here: link

In the next blog, We will explore End-to-End process in more detail.

Request your free* SAP Signavio Process, Insights discovery edition analysis today: https://url.sap/discovery-edition
(*For SAP maintenance customers)


Any queries, please reach out to us!

Kind regards,

Discovery team
SAP Signavio

entry.title: crystal report for special term on customers & vendors
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm creating two subreports under Aged receivable and aged payables. They are customer info and vendor info with special terms.

I have below conditions to show on both of the subreports:

-Order date less than 2 years

-Active customers or vendors only

-Exclude net 30, net 60, net 90 & net 120

Can you help advise what parameters or formulas I need to apply so that it will show based on above three conditions? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: print settings issue
entry.content: HI Wiseman, thank you for your reply, my problem has been resolved, problem is not with CR version, it looks like that there was custom fromat label and print settings must be changed for that custom label and not the printer itself.

entry.title: HTX Referral Code "chucc" - HTX Welcome Bonus for New User $56720
entry.content: HTX Referral Code is chucc to get $567200 as a welcome bonus and 100% discount and cashback on trading fee. HTX formerly Huobi is giving $56720 on signup to every new user who makes an account using the referral code. HTX formerly Huobi is running refer and earn program in which offering. You will get an additional 50% discount on a trading fee if you choose to pay via a point card or HTX token. HTX is also offering up to 50% rebates on each referral. So why not use an invitation code before registering to HTX global website or app.

please explain whether You have followed instructions stated in SCT Setup Guide to gain access to API service: Initial Setup | SAP Help Portal (chapter API service)

Emanuel Mercl

entry.title: Re: How to transfer stock from one customer stock (W) to...
entry.content:
Hi,

There's a way to transfer the stock and to automate it using InsightZAP.

It enables users to create business processes and automation without code on SAP, and I believe it might be able to transfer the stock for you.

entry.title: FPCOPARA - Error EZ488 Sender address does not contain any data for dispatch type EMAIL
entry.content:
Why is SAP checking company code (BUKRS) email address while generating correspondences?
Why is the system forcing to fetch the sender email address from company code email ID.
When the company code email is not maintained, the error EZ488 is thrown.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FPCOPARA - Error EZ488 Sender address does not contai...
entry.content:
To avoid the error EZ448 in standard maintain the following customizing: 
SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Financial Accounting -> Financial Accounting Global Settings -> Global Parameters for Company Code -> Enter Global Parameters 
Select the relevant company code. Click on button 'Address' and maintain a valid email for the sender.

Workarounds to change the address number in correspondence trigger or use a different mail address when printing:
  1. BAdI Definition EFG_COMM_ADDRESS_SENDER -> change of sender email address during the print
OR
  2. Event 0760 FKK_SAMPLE_0760 -> change of sender address number (table DFKKCOH) during the creation of the print trigger

entry.title: CAP Autentication error
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am trying to develop a CAP application to expose Hana Cloud tables as OData services so that I can use them later. Creating this application, I am running into the error:

Authentication kind "jwt" configured, but no XSUAA instance bound to application. Either bind an IAS instance, or switch to an authentication kind that does not require a binding.


In the package.json file I have specified this:

The problem is that when I change the jwt with xsuaa I get the same error but saying I should use IAS instance. And with the IAS I get the same error too.

I have also tried with a dummy or mocked authentication. When I used those, I go a bit further on the process but then I get an error saying:

"Error: No database credentials provided","at credentials4 (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/hana/pool.js:22:27)"

I have created this application following this tutorial : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/use-cap-to-expose-hana-cloud-tables-as-odata-services/ba-p/13486494

Does anyone know how to solve this problem?

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Render and View PDF in SAP UI5 with Forms service by adobe in BTP
entry.content:
Hi @Jacky_Liu 

thanks a lot for his blog! 

I already achieved an integration with adobe forms with help of your guidance and I can already render some data based on actual data instances of my CAP application. But I have a question regarding the sending of more complex xml data....is there any easy way to build the xml data in javascript (nodeJs) based application and send to API? Currently, I am building the xml structure as some sort of string array. After exporting a sample from adobe lifecycle designer I get the xml structure and fill in programmatically. But this is not the best solution as soon as the XML gets larger and more complex.

Thank you for your support.

Best regards

Rufat

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 9.0 - Entendendo as prioridades para determinação de contas contábeis, utilizan
entry.content: 9 Anos se passaram do artigo e se tornou útil nos dias de hoje em 2024 , parabéns !

entry.title: Re: Preparing for SAP Identity Management’s End-of-Maintenance in 2027
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

In the architecture diagram you showed,  we can see there is REST based connection or communication between Entra ID and SAP IAG. Are there connectors published by SAP IAG to be integrated with Entra ID for providing user provisioning signals ( allow and deny  events)?

For instance, we plan to use SAP HR and Entra ID out of the box connector for it and can then provision the users to SAP Identity directory using SCIM. However, since Access request or Role request is mainly done at SAP IAG ( or GRC if on premise) , how can Entra Id fit here ?

Entra ID has no information about SAP applicatio Roles configured in SAP end application unlike SAP IAG which has sync jobs to fetch these information and thus it becomes the central system to raise access request and based on outcome of request the user is provisioned to SAP application to that requested role.

How will this be possible with Entra ID.

Its hard to fix this puzzle, could you please throw some light here ?

We need to get this sorted out... Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Group Reporting Rule Based COI - TP calculation
entry.content: Hello experts, we are writing to ask for your help regarding the task of eliminating the 2100 participations from the consolidation monitor. We have defined the companies, the consolidation method, and the first consolidation period 001.2022. We have entered the percentages in the technical account S0001, all at 100% except one at 80%. We made an entry on the account with the trigger for the period 001.2022, but we don't understand why sequence 041 is not being read (the logs show sequences 010, 011, 040, 050, 051, 054, 055). Does anyone happen to have any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Document deletion in ISHMed
entry.content:
You can use DOCUMENT_MAIN BAdI. At the before_save method, you can detect if the document is being deleted at the DRAW-LOEDK parameter.

On the other side, you can enhance the delete_indicator_set subroutine of the N230 Function Group.

entry.title: Re: GHG Recording don't work - Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:
Hi Lucia, 

this message can occur when no valid activities are available from the Emission Inventory app. But once the user created activities, this error should not come. You mentioned that you already created the activities. In this case, please create a case via Service Now for component SUS-SCT to have this investigated by development team. Thank you. 

Best Regards, 

Lenka Simikova

entry.title: Re: Customize body mail for medium type 5 external send
entry.content: Don't you trust the SAP note?

entry.title: Re: End to End UI5 application on SAP BTP
entry.content:
@archisman92 Nice blog!

For everyone struggeling with getting the node application running once you pushed it to cf, make sure to define the start script as well as manually install the packages. For some reason the node init command did not setup everything correctly for me.

 

  "scripts": {
    "start": "node index.js"
  }
npm install express cors bluebird @sap/xsenv pg-promise
node index.js

 

After running the "node install" command as well as the "node index.js" command localy, you should get an error because the database is missing. But once you push it to cf, everything is working.

Cheers, Andreas

entry.title: HANA DB usage of JSON embedded functions
entry.content:
Hello all, 

 

I see that there are other questions here about HANA, pretty old but still decided to ask. 

 

I am trying to query some data and have a NCLOB column with a JSON inside. I can get a specific field using JSON_VALUE function.

Why I cannot use JSON_VALUE in a WHERE clause, doesn't it work exactly the same as a normal filtering, gets some column, check if matches a value, just a little bit more complicated etc. parsing and getting a specific field from a column with JSON inside.

entry.title: Re: Logical filename ARCHIVLINK_SERVERPATH not configured
entry.content:
Hello, If someone is looking for fix atm. Its provided in Note 3452859

3452859 - No physical path is configured for Logical file name ARCHIVLINK_SERVERPATH

https://me.sap.com/notes/3452859/E

entry.title: Re: Design and management of custom exception classes - best practice?
entry.content:
Hello

What is the best practice to combine multiple messages, given by a BAPI, (table of BAPIRET2) with the concept of Exception classes?

1.) A Method returns BAPI Messages to the invoker as a returning Parameter. The invoker checks wheather it contains an error (and reacts accordingly). Disadvantages: It is like a return code with all above mentioned disadvantages (old World). 

2.) A Method raise an IF_T100_MESSAGE-Exception containing only the first BAPI-Message type Error. Disadvantages: We loose all other Messages (Waring/ Information)

3.) A Method raises an Exception. The Exception has a Member-Attribute type Table ob BAPIRET2. All of the Bapi-Messages are stored within the Exception. The Exception is only raised when the Bapi-Table contains at least one Message type Error. Disdavantes: The Previous-Concept does not work anymore. Lets call it "Bapi-Exception". It has  no own TextID but a table of Bapi-Messages. If this Bapi-Exception is the previous Exception to another Exceptipion, the "higher" Exception must be a "Bapi-Exception" too(...). Another Disadvantage could be: We have to return the Messages as a returniung-Parameter if the Bapi-Table has no ErrorMessage anyway.

4.) We transform recursively all the Bapi-Messages to IF_T100_MESSAGE Exception using the Previous -Concept. This means we create 1 Exception for each line of the Bapi-Messages and chain them together with the Previous-Construct. Disadvantes: We misuse an Exception as a Protocol because an Exception is per definition an Error and it is not a Warning/Information.... Another Disadvantage could be the Performance(....)

5.) We make somehow use of the "Resumable" Concept (see above one Post): We raise a Resumable Exception for the Warning an Information-Messages....

 

In my Project I use IF_T100_MESSAGE Exceptions for "normal" Exceptions and stick with No. 1. (the Old World) in Case we deal with BAPI Messages because all the other Options is like choosing between pest and cholera.

entry.title: Re: DUMP MESSAGE_TYPE_X Program C_OI_ERRORS===================CP component BC-FES-OFF
entry.content: 32 bit GUI

entry.title: Re: Using AMDP in CDS and Some Useful Functions
entry.content:
Dear all, 
I do have two remaining issues with an AMDP Method. 
First and most burning issue is to use a CDS View with parameters in this AMDP Method. I can't figure out how to pass the parameters. 
Second issue, to improve the performance I would like to use a string variable as a where condition directly in the select to gain some improvements instead afterwards is a filter.
Can someone help me out?
Many thanks in advance .
Here the complete class to get a better unterstanding of the current issues:

CLASS /cust/cl_fi_accc_amdp_db_serv DEFINITION
  PUBLIC FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.
    INTERFACES /cust/if_definitions.

    CLASS-METHODS get_acc_provision_data
      IMPORTING VALUE(id_year)          TYPE gjahr
                VALUE(id_period)        TYPE rpmax
                VALUE(id_rn_where_cond) TYPE string
      EXPORTING VALUE(et_selected_data) TYPE /cust/if_definitions~mtyt_test_struc_tab.

    CLASS-METHODS get_where_from_ranges
      IMPORTING irt_rn_bukrs         TYPE REF TO trgr_bukrs
                irt_rn_kostl         TYPE REF TO fagl_range_t_kostl
                irt_rn_aufnr         TYPE REF TO range_t_aufnr
                irt_rn_racct         TYPE REF TO trgr_gl_account
      RETURNING VALUE(rd_where_cond) TYPE string.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS /CUST/cl_fi_accc_amdp_db_serv IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD get_acc_provision_data BY DATABASE PROCEDURE FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
         OPTIONS READ-ONLY USING /cust/fi_acc_md1 /cust/fi_fgl_rst.

    -- CDS View: /CUST/FI_FAGLFLEXT_RSTSP and his SQL_View_Name = /CUST/FI_FGL_RST

        tmp_itab = select *
                     from "/CUST/MASTERDATA1" as MD1
                     full outer join "CUST/FI_FGL_RST"( p_requested_period = : id_period,
                                                        p_requested_year = : id_year ) as FGL
                        on    MD1.company_code = FGL.rbukrs
                          and MD1.AUFNR        = FGL.ZZAufNr
                          and MD1.KOSTL        = FGL.rcntr
                          and MD1.v_prctr      = FGL.prctr
                      where rbukrs = '1000' ;
                      -- and :id_rn_where_cond;

         et_selected_data = APPLY_FILTER (:tmp_itab, :id_rn_where_cond);

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_where_from_ranges.

    DATA: lt_named_selltabs TYPE if_shdb_def=>tt_named_dref,
          lrs_named_selltab TYPE REF TO if_shdb_def=>ts_named_dref.

    IF   irt_rn_bukrs->* IS NOT INITIAL.
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_named_selltabs REFERENCE INTO lrs_named_selltab.
      lrs_named_selltab->name = 'COMPANY_CODE'.
      lrs_named_selltab->dref = irt_rn_bukrs.
    ENDIF.

    IF   irt_rn_kostl->* IS NOT INITIAL.
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_named_selltabs REFERENCE INTO lrs_named_selltab.
      lrs_named_selltab->name = 'KOSTL'.
      lrs_named_selltab->dref = irt_rn_kostl.
    ENDIF.

    IF   irt_rn_aufnr->* IS NOT INITIAL.
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_named_selltabs REFERENCE INTO lrs_named_selltab.
      lrs_named_selltab->name = 'AUFNR'.
      lrs_named_selltab->dref = irt_rn_aufnr.
    ENDIF.

    IF   irt_rn_racct->* IS NOT INITIAL.
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_named_selltabs REFERENCE INTO lrs_named_selltab.
      lrs_named_selltab->name = 'RACCT'.
      lrs_named_selltab->dref = irt_rn_racct.
    ENDIF.

    TRY.
        rd_where_cond = cl_shdb_seltab=>combine_seltabs(
                          it_named_seltabs = lt_named_selltabs ).
      CATCH cx_shdb_exception.
        CLEAR rd_where_cond.
    ENDTRY.

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: HTX Referral Code "chucc" - HTX Welcome Bonus for New...
entry.content:
Binance Referral Code 2024: QOBQ77NR - Sign-up Bonus of $50,000 Cashback

By entering the Binance referral ID QOBQ77NR in 2024, you are guaranteed the maximum discount. This code also guarantees an exclusive sign-up bonus of $50,000 cashback on transaction fees after the user completes their tasks. This means that the maximum 20% discount will be applied to your account forever. This discount is lifetime, i.e. it will never expire.

entry.title: Re: git command to connect to BTP Destination pointing to...
entry.content: thanks for the response. let us say we have repository for each application separately for instance repo1: https://gitrepo.e/app1 , repo2: https://gitrep.e/app2 so on..my understanding was we need to create only one destination for the root ie. https://gitrepo.e . if we do not need to use the destination name then the destination url for instance https://gitrepo.e will automatically resolve to https://gitrepo.e/app1 or https://gitrepo.e/app2 ??

entry.title: Re: Tree Table (read-only) in ABAP Restful
entry.content: Hi Andre , we would you like to show our BAL Log Messages via Tree View oData V4 on RAP. Tree View require Hierarchy but we can't use Hierarchy because we don't have any chances to get log messages from table because there is no transparent database table for log messages. That's why we have to use custom entity to getting messages. When we use custom entity we can't use TreeView( Hierarcy ). My question is there any proper way to do that or should we expose our entity and extend ui side with Tree View ? All the best.

entry.title: Freight document types
entry.content:
Hello,

In the version 2402, I don’t see any config to create new document types (for freight unit, freight order etc). There are few standard types given by SAP. However maintenance of those types are also not visible. Is this config completely off from public cloud ?

entry.title: Re: To get records for last 120days(4 Moths) in BODS
entry.content:
Hi,

Try this:

ERDAT >= sysdate() +num_to_interval(-120,'D')

entry.title: Re: Data Load Integrity Control
entry.content:
@XaviPolo What a great experiment! 😉 and what a great scientific proof of how DFs work with Control Fetch Sizes in error situations. ✔️ Very valuable findings! 

It's interesting to see that unexpectedly even the previous block --in your example 19,001-20,000-- was not loaded. This proves the value of the experiment! I think you've explained the reason very well.

There still seems to be a question about the theoretical maximum limit of the fetch size being 100,000. Where has it been mentioned that the maximum limit of fetch size is 100,000? Is it an official limit?

The risk associated with delta loads is so critical. That's why monitoring and managing ETLs is so important.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - IDOC to flat file conversion
entry.content:
Hi smitha_gatty,

Please check out the following URL. It will helpful on achieving your goal through Groovy script and XSLT

https://figaf.com/chatgpt-groovy-code-help-for-sap-cloud-integration/

Regards ,

Azmath.

entry.title: CPI Mapping condition issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to implement a mapping condition in CPI but unable to populate the data in target as per the requirement..

Scenario 1

If <S_LT> and <S_TM> contains same number of segments in a context then copy <D_373>  to target field.

Which is working fine.

 

Scenario 2

If <S_TM> comes only once in a context and <S_LT> comes more than once, then copy <D_373> to target as many as the occurrences of <S_LT>

entry.title: Re: Setup email alerts and where to check email history i...
entry.content:
To set up email alerts and check email history in HANA Cockpit 2.0, you can follow these steps:

Log in to the SAP HANA Cockpit and Navigate to the "System Overview" page. Click on the "Alerts" tile, then click on the "Configure Email" button. This will open the "Email Configuration" dialog.
In the "Email Configuration" dialog, enter the SMTP server details and the email address where you want to receive the alerts and click on the "Test Email Configuration" button to send a test email. If the test email is sent successfully, you will receive a confirmation message. Save it.
Now, you can configure the alerts that you want to receive by email - go back to the "Alerts" page and click on the "Configure Alerts" button. In the "Alert Configuration" dialog, select the alerts that you want to receive by email and click on the "Save" button.

To check the email history:

Log in to the SAP HANA Cockpit - navigate to the "System Overview" page and click on the "Alerts" tile. Click on the "Email History" button - on the "Email History" page, you can see the history of the emails that have been sent.

If you are still not receiving the email alerts, you may need to check the following:
- Make sure that the SMTP server is configured correctly and is working properly.
- Check if the email address where you want to receive the alerts is correct and is able to receive emails.
- Check if the alerts are configured correctly and are triggered when the backup is successful or fails.
- Check if there are any errors in the email history. If there are any errors, they may give you a clue about what is going wrong.

In Employee profile Job grade is uodated as 1-10, But in form is reflcting as Garde 10,Grade 11 etc. Don;t know from where these details are cominng.

entry.title: FKKINVDOC_DISP: Select and display an archived invoice by alternative selection fields
entry.content:
It is not possible to select an archived invoicing document in transaction FKKINVDOC_DISP by using one of the fields:
 FIKEY - Reconciliation Key
 EXBEL - Official Document Number


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FKKINVDOC_DISP: Select and display an archived invoic...
entry.content:
In standard the Official Document Number and the Reconciliation Key are not available for selection of an archived invoicing document. It is possible to create a customer archive infostructure with those fields. Just do the following:
- Start transaction SARI and choose the button CUSTOMIZING.
- Create a new customer archive infostructure (possible to copy standard infostructure SAP_FICA_INVDIR).
- Add the missing/optional fields to the tab 'Info structure fields'. 
- Save and activate the customer archive infostructure.
All future archived invoices can be selected and displayed with the customer archive infostructure. In transaction FKKINVDOC_DISP you have to use the button ARCHIVE and choose your own infostructure.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
While I understand the hype around Datasphere, I don't agree that it's ready to take over the role of SAP BW.

Same as you, my career, for the last 24 years, has been around SAP BW. On BW/4HANA 2023 today. 

SAP BW is a much more mature platform than Datasphere at this moment. The BW Bridge component in Datasphere is still far from giving the users the same functionality and capabilities they find in BW/4. The fact that SAP has committed to support BW/4 all the way to 2040 is a sign of how solid it is.

From the Datawarehouse point of view, doesn't make sense, at this time, to jump from BW to Datasphere. Maybe a few years from now that might be the case.

Question is, why jump now into Datasphere, if you have a mature BW platform that, if you haven't, can still be upgraded to BW/4HANA, which works in perfect harmony with S/4HANA and provides all the good proven functionality expected from an Enterprise Datawarehouse?

In my opinion, no, Datasphere is not ready to assume the role of SAP BW... Not yet.

entry.title: Emarsys Core API: Create Contact List
entry.content:
I keep getting 403 errors when I try to create a Contact List via Emarsys API. Below is my code, any idea what I am doing wrong? 

PS: the credentials are not the problem, I can do other API calls with them

 

 

def get_auth(username, secret):
    nonce = uuid.uuid4().hex

    timestamp = datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')

    raw_password_digest = nonce + timestamp + secret

    encrypted_password_digest = hashlib.sha1()
    encrypted_password_digest.update(raw_password_digest.encode())
    pass_sha1 = encrypted_password_digest.hexdigest()

    pass_digest = base64.b64encode(pass_sha1.encode()).decode()

    headers= {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Accept': 'application/json',
    'X-WSSE': 'UsernameToken Username="{}", PasswordDigest="{}", Nonce="{}", Created="{}"'.format(
        username,
        pass_digest,
        nonce,
        timestamp)}
    return headers

url_contact_lists = 'https://api.emarsys.net/api/v2/contactlist'
# The payload you need to pass to your call. 
payload = {
  "key_id": "3",
  "name": "test_list",
  "external_ids": ['test.test@test.com', 'test2.test2@test.com'],
  "description": "test list",
}

headers=get_auth(username, secret)

response_post = requests.post(url_contact_lists, headers=get_auth(username, secret),  data=json.dumps(payload))

entry.title: Re: Blog editor does strange changes
entry.content:
Hi, @thomas_mller13:

This is a known bug that has been reported to our vendor. Unfortunately, I don't have a timeline for the fix.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Enhancing Attachment Functionality in HCM Fiori Applications
entry.content:
Using HR Fiori applications, e.g. My Banking Application, My Family, and My Addresses within SAP Fiori, and I'm interested in adding attachments to these apps. Is there a standard option or extension available for implementing attachment functionality?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Enhancing Attachment Functionality in HCM Fiori Appli...
entry.content:
While there isn't a standard option or extension readily available for implementing attachment functionality in these apps, I'd like to present two alternative solutions that might meet your needs:

  1. Attachment Service Introduction:
    • SAP's Attachment Service serves as a central, unified solution tailored for uploading attachments across various applications within SAP S/4HANA.
    • It facilitates operations like uploading, downloading, deleting, and renaming attachments, seamlessly integrating with SAP Fiori apps.
    • Attachments can be associated with leading business objects, stored in repositories such as SAP Content Server, and managed as drafts.
    • For further details, please refer to the  Attachment Service documentation.
  2. SAPUI5 Upload Set Control:
    • The SAPUI5 Upload Set control enables users to upload single or multiple files directly from different devices to a Fiori app.
    • It supports functionalities like uploading, downloading, editing, and deleting files, offering options to display attributes and statuses for each file.
    • The control provides flexibility in upload modes, allowing users to choose between instant or manual upload, and it can be customized to meet specific requirements.
    • More information about the SAPUI5 Upload Set control can be found here.

entry.title: Service Cloud V2 last agent interaction
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

on Service Cloud V1 I had the Last Agent Interaction and Last Customer Interaction values available to use them on WFR.

Now on the Service Cloud V2 I can't find those fields to be used under Determinations.

Does anyone know if they have a different name now or if they actually don't exit more in V2?

My use case is to set the Status to Waiting for Reply when the agent creates an interaction, and then set it to In Process when the customer replies back.

Best regards,

Eduardo

entry.title: CDS view Required - S4Hana Public Cloud MD04 - stock functionality (released)
entry.content:
Hi all,

we would like to use the stock calculation of the MD04 in a separate application (side-by-side). We try to find some CDS views which are actually released and cover the functionality. We can find the actual stock variants (i_materialstock..., I_EWM_AVAILABLESTOCK etc) but we also need to take reservations into account. 

Any option or combination available (released!) which we can use to cover the md04 functionality in a CDS view (API would be ok as well). 

Kind regards

Laurens

Please bring it back 😕

entry.title: EXECUTE QUERY ONLY IF USER IN MY LISTE
entry.content:
Hi, 

HOW CAN I SET UP A QUERY THAT DISPLAYS A RESULT ONLY IF THE USERS I HAVE DEFINED IN THE LIST ARE EXECUTING THE QUERY? 

SELECT distinct  t3.docnum as 'N° Demande', t3.docdate 'Date Demande', T0.[DocNum], T0.[DocDate], T0.[TaxDate], T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName], T0.[DocType], T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription], T1.[UomCode], T1.[Quantity], T1.[OpenQty], T1.[PriceBefDi], T1.[TotalSumSy], T1.[Currency], T0.[Comments] 
FROM OPOR T0  
INNER JOIN POR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]
left JOIN  PRQ1 T2 ON T1.BaseEntry =T2.DocEntry
left join OPRQ t3 on t3.docentry=t2.docentry
 WHERE T0.[CANCELED] = 'N'

LIKE THIS MY QUERY IS PUBLIC, ANY ONE CAN HAVE THE RESULT.

ANY IDEAS ?

entry.title: Re: Need Info on System Owner Permissions for SAC,DSP
entry.content:
Hi @YuZhang,

This is how I see it.

System Owner for Datasphere: "Includes all user privileges to allow unrestricted access to all areas of the application. Exactly one user must be assigned to this role." Check out Standard Roles Delivered with SAP Datasphere Yes, only System Owner can do Enabling a Custom SAML Identity Provider - DW Administrator can temporarily become System Owner if needed. Also usually this SAML configuration one-time thing. I think all other admin task can be done by users who have DW Administrator role.

System Owner for SAP Analytics Cloud: "Includes all user privileges to allow unrestricted access to all areas of the application. Only one user in the system can be assigned to this role, and it must always be assigned to a user." Check out Standard Application Roles. Yes, only System Owner can do Enable a Custom SAML Identity Provider - Admin can temporarily become System Owner if needed. Also usually this SAML configuration one-time thing. I think all other admin task can be done by users who have Admin role.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Making an API call and unzipping a file in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @mitko1994,

Yes, these steps are not all possible in Datasphere as of now! 

You need to use either SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration OR  SAP Data Intelligence for that please note that SAP DI is nearing the end of its lifecycle. 

I'm wondering which app and its APIs you are using. Is it something with SAP Ariba?

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Bing X Referral Code: TXXS5I | SignUp Bonus (Apr 2024)
entry.content: The primary Bing X Referral Code to use is TXXS5I. Applying this code gives you a sign-up bonus of $1000. Also, by sharing your code with friends, you can earn a 50% commission.
